channel.title: Blog posts by VimYoung
channel.description: Coding as a path to peace.

item.title: Hello and welcome to my blog. I am Bhaumik. Here, I talk about my general views on the latest technologies and software as well as create follow up contents on the latest things I am working on.
item.content:encoded:
You can contact me at my email(again): ramayen@tutamail.com Also, my username in discord is ramayen and I am also available there.

Over the head questions about React, NextJS and Javascript: Part-2

public:: true tags:: web-dev description:: Part two of covering questions as newcomer to react and Nextjs. lang:: js, html id:: 698c5f18-1a29-4088-a1d2-4911b0ce5c8e #Blog Posts

Over the head questions about React, Nextjs and Javascript: Part-1

id:: 6931ab34-aad0-4894-8d44-3c07d3da0924 public:: true tags:: web-dev description:: In this blog post I go along misconceptions and confusions I had when learning react, Nextjs and Javascript. lang:: js, html #Blog Posts

Make your first widget with Spell

id:: 68bc04cb-a892-46b1-a6ff-39386aa03637 public:: true tags:: tutorial description:: Make your first widget with spell and slint for desktop linux. lang:: rust, slint #Blog Posts

Frame rate improvement for faster rendering

id:: 68ae71d1-d38e-4cd9-8499-47eda5c8f23a public:: true tags:: theoretical-writeups, technical description:: Performance improvement for frame rendering in my library lang:: rust #Blog Posts

Hardened Scopes: A mental model for rust

query-sort-by:: page query-table:: true query-sort-desc:: false query-properties:: [:page :public :description] id:: 68480561-09fa-4f92-afd2-e45b8d9a5b15 public:: true tags:: theoretical-writeups description:: Describing a mental model to be used when working with rust. lang:: rust #Blog Posts

item.title: Hello World
item.content:encoded:
Hello, this is my first post on my new blog generated by Marmite1, a very simple to use blog generator.

I can write full CommonMark and GFM Markdown.

Emojis 😄
